zh.Christchurch, Middlesex, Virginia, Briti: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州米德萊可可利斯丘其
zh.Middlesex, Virginia, British Colonial Am: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州米德萊可
zh.lifeSummary: Nicholas Paine是maybe Nicholas Payne和Penelope Cheney的兒子，於1665年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州米德萊可可利斯丘其。他於1687年12月17日與Mary Hackney在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州米德萊可可利斯丘其結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1694年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州米德萊可享年29歲。

zh-hans.Christchurch, Middlesex, Virginia, Briti: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州米德萊可可利斯丘其

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Nicholas Paine是maybe Nicholas Payne和Penelope Cheney的儿子，于1665年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州米德萊可可利斯丘其。他于1687年12月17日与Mary Hackney在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州米德萊可可利斯丘其结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他去世于1694年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州米德萊可享年29岁。

nameMeanings.name: Paine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: History: The author of the republican treatise The Rights of Man, Thomas Paine (1737–1809), left England for North America in the mid 1770s, where he became involved in the movement that led to independence. His pamphlet of 1776, Common Sense, influenced the Declaration of Independence and furnished some of the arguments justifying it.

variants.name: Pain
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Jean-Luc, Normand, Reynald, Veronique.
French: from pain ‘bread’, used as a nickname for a baker.

variants.name: Payne
meanings: English: from the Middle English and Old French personal name Pai(e)n, Pagen (from Latin Paganus), a fairly common personal name among Normans. It derived from a word that originally meant ‘villager, rustic’, later ‘heathen’, but it had doubtless lost these connotations in its use as a late medieval personal name. This name has also been established in Ireland since the 14th century.

History: Thomas Payne, who was a freeman of Plymouth Colony in 1639, was the founder of a large American family, which included Robert Treat Paine (1731–1814), one of the signers of the Declaration of Independence. See also   Paine  .

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

en.lifeSummary: Nicholas Paine was born in 1665, in Christchurch, Middlesex, Virginia, British Colonial America as the son of maybe Nicholas Payne and Penelope Cheney. He married Mary Hackney on 17 December 1687, in Christchurch, Middlesex, Virginia, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died in 1694, in Middlesex, Virginia, British Colonial America, at the age of 29.

ja.lifeSummary: Nicholas Paineは1665年にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州ミッドレセックスチリストチャーチでmaybe Nicholas PayneとPenelope Cheneyの息子として生まれた。1687年12月17日にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州ミッドレセックスチリストチャーチでMary Hackneyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は1694年にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州ミッドレセックスで29歳で死去した。

ko.Christchurch, Middlesex, Virginia, Briti: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 미들레세스 크리스트c후르치
ko.Middlesex, Virginia, British Colonial Am: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 미들레세스
ko.lifeSummary: Nicholas Paine(은)는 1665년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 미들레세스 크리스트c후르치에서 maybe Nicholas Payne(와)과 Penelope Cheney의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1687년 12월 17일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 미들레세스 크리스트c후르치에서 Mary Hackney(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1694년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 미들레세스에서 29세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Christchurch, Middlesex, Virginia, Briti: крисчурч, миддлесекс, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Nicholas Paine родился в 1665 г. в местности крисчурч, миддлесекс, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика. Его родителей звали maybe Nicholas Payne и Penelope Cheney. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Hackney 17 декабря 1687 г. в местности крисчурч, миддлесекс, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер в 1694 г. в местности миддлесекс, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 29 лет.
